Hardin Diagnostic Bay
Classics welcome

Your grandfather's car deserves better than a guess.

Most shops won't touch a carburetor. Steve grew up on them. From weekend cruisers to barn finds, Hardin treats old iron like it matters, because it does.

Muscle, old and new · both live here
Carbs, points & drumsOld-school systems diagnosed by someone who learned on them, not a scan tool that shrugs.
Parts hunting includedDiscontinued part? We chase down NOS, reproduction, and donor options before quoting you.
Driven, not traileredThe goal is a classic you actually drive on Saturday, not a garage ornament waiting on a shop.
